name: Hold Monster

rulesText.description: Single-target lockdown that fits her nonlethal disable/maim/control style. Particularly scary before a tendril, bite, or false mercy follow-up.

mechanics.label: Paralyzed
mechanics.description: A failed Wisdom save leaves the target paralyzed.

mechanics.label: Repeat Save
mechanics.description: The target repeats the save at the end of each of its turns.

desc: Single-target lockdown that fits her nonlethal disable/maim/control style. Particularly scary before a tendril, bite, or false mercy follow-up.
